title: HandoffContract
description: Pairs one SubtaskPayload input schema with one SubagentResult output schema to define a swappable subagent role. FR-008 and SC-003 depend on this pairing being the sole basis for substitution: an implementation swap is safe iff it preserves both schemas and the role_name.

role_name.description: Unique within a coordinator. Coordinator routes spawns by this name (FR-008).

input_schema.description: JSON Schema applied to SubtaskPayload.inputs. Restricts coordinator→subagent information to declared fields (FR-001).

output_schema.description: JSON Schema applied to SubagentResult.output on status=='ok'. Restricts subagent→coordinator information to declared fields (FR-003).
